creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Fri Jun  7 21:40:10 2013
New Revision: 320226
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/320226

Log:
  - Update to 1.1.28
  - Chase py-requests update [1]
  
  PR:		ports/178227 [1]
  Submitted by:	Jan Beich <jbeich@tormail.org> [1]
  Approved by:	culot / jpaetzel (mentors, implicit), maintainer (timeout)

Modified:
  head/www/py-flexget/Makefile
  head/www/py-flexget/distinfo
  head/www/py-flexget/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/py-flexget/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-flexget/Makefile	Fri Jun  7 20:27:46 2013	(r320225)
+++ head/www/py-flexget/Makefile	Fri Jun  7 21:40:10 2013	(r320226)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	flexget
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.3273
+PORTVERSION=	1.1.28
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	www python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://download.flexget.com/archive/ \
@@ -21,18 +21,19 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}sqla
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}dateutil>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-dateutil \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}yaml>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-yaml \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}Jinja2>=0.11:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-Jinja2 \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pygooglechart>=0:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/py-pygooglechart \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}progressbar>=0:${PORTSDIR}/misc/py-progressbar \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pynzb>=0:${PORTSDIR}/news/py-pynzb \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}feedparser>=5.1.2:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-feedparser \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}feedparser>=5.1.3:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-feedparser \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}rss2gen>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-rss2gen \
 		${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/BeautifulSoup.py:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-beautifulsoup32 \
 		${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/bs4/__init__.py:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-beautifulsoup \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}cherrypy>=3.2.0:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-cherrypy \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}Flask>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-flask \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}html5lib>=0.11:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-html5lib \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}requests>=0.14:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-requests \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}nose>=0.11:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-nose
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}requests>=1:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-requests \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}nose>=0.11:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-nose \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}jsonschema>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-jsonschema \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}tvrage>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-tvrage
 
 USE_PYTHON=	-2.7
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
@@ -42,7 +43,4 @@ PYDISTUTILS_NOEGGINFO=	yes
 
 PLIST_SUB=	PYDISTUTILS_EGGINFO=${PYDISTUTILS_EGGINFO}
 
-post-extract:
-	@${CHMOD} -R o+r ${WRKSRC}
-
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
